js:
document.querySelectorAll('.dest-card').forEach(card => { card.addEventListener('click', function() { this.style.transform = 'scale(0.96)'; setTimeout(() => this.style.transform = '', 200); }); });
document.querySelector('.follow-btn').addEventListener('click', function() { const prev = this.textContent; this.textContent = '✓ Takip Ediliyor'; this.style.background = '#22c55e'; setTimeout(() => { this.textContent = prev; this.style.background = '#0d9488'; }, 2000); });
